posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Community,

I’m using Forms to create a Project Request and Proposal workflow. The Project Request form is filled out then submitted. After submission a link to the proposal form will be created then the proper person will receive a link to the Proposal Form where they will have to input the unique ID from the first column and will be taken to the Proposal Form Itself that has fields filled out from the request form and also its own unique fields to fill out. I’m working with SuperForms and cant quite figure out how to connect the Forms.

Any ideas?

posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml: I have figured out how to connect the forms. No need for a response to this Form Question.

posts.author: matts (Matt S)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jared, could you share what you found? Thank you.
